footer.description: Voice transcription and notes. Transcribe, organize, and summarize your recordings.

upload.dropOrBrowse: Drop audio here or click to browse
upload.supportedFormats: WAV, MP3, M4A, WEBM, OGG, FLAC
upload.dialogDescription: Add an audio file to your library. Transcription starts when you choose to from the recordings list.

record.dialogDescription: Capture audio from your microphone. You can close this dialog while recording — controls stay in the header.
record.recordHint: Capture your audio, then stop when you are done.
record.saveHint: Listen to your recording, then save it to your library or discard it.
record.includeSystemAudioHint: Also records sound playing anywhere on your computer — meetings, apps, or other tabs.
record.includeSystemAudioInstructions1: Your browser will ask to share your screen. This is required to access system audio — Finch cannot read it any other way.
record.includeSystemAudioInstructions2: Choose Entire screen (or your display), then turn on Also share system audio (wording varies by browser).
record.includeSystemAudioInstructions3: Finch discards the video track immediately. Only audio is recorded and saved — nothing from your screen is stored.

errors.noSystemAudio: No system audio was shared. Choose Entire screen and enable system audio sharing.

recordings.emptyDescription: Record or upload audio to create your first recording.
recordings.recentEmpty: No recordings yet. Record or upload audio to get started.
recordings.renameDescription: Update the title shown in your recordings library.
recordings.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the recording, its transcript, and all notes.
recordings.regenerateDescription: This replaces the current transcript, speaker labels, and any edits with a fresh transcription.

recording.pendingDescription: Transcription has not started yet. Start it when you are ready.
recording.transcribingHint: You can leave this page and check the recordings list. The status will update automatically.
recording.failedDefault: Something went wrong during transcription. Try again.
recording.speakerTurnDescription: Assign a name or link to a saved voiceprint profile. Changes apply to all turns from this voice on the transcript.
recording.voiceprintProfilesReadyHint: Saving updates the voiceprint from this turn's audio for future recordings.
recording.voiceprintProfilesConsentHint: Accept the consent prompt when saving to store a local voiceprint for this speaker.
recording.voiceprintProfilesDisabledHint: Voiceprint profiles are unavailable. The display name applies to this recording only.

notes.createDialogDescription: Generate a note with AI or start from a blank page.
notes.blankDescription: Start with an empty note and write your own markdown.
notes.llmRequiredBanner: AI note templates require an LLM provider. Configure <link></link>. Blank notes are always available.
notes.generatingHint: You can switch tabs or leave this page — generation will continue in the background.
notes.failedDescription: Something went wrong while generating this note. Delete it and try again.
notes.emptyDescription: Create a note from an AI template or start with a blank page.
notes.renameDescription: Update the name shown in the note list.
notes.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the selected note from this recording.
notes.discardDescription: You have unsaved edits. Switch notes without saving?

meeting_summary.title: Meeting Summary
meeting_summary.description: Overview, key points, and open questions from the transcript.

action_items.title: Action Items
action_items.description: Checklist of tasks, owners, and deadlines mentioned in the recording.

key_decisions.title: Key Decisions
key_decisions.description: Decisions made during the conversation and the context behind them.

follow_up_email.title: Follow-up Email
follow_up_email.description: Draft a professional follow-up email recap for attendees.

voiceprints.emptyDescription: Create one from About you, or add another profile below.
voiceprints.enrollmentDialogDescription: Follow the steps to record and save a voiceprint sample.
voiceprints.enrollmentDescription: Read the passage below aloud, then save a local voiceprint sample for future recordings.
voiceprints.enrollmentHowItWorks1: Check that your microphone is working before you record.
voiceprints.enrollmentHowItWorks2: Read the example passage aloud in a quiet place.
voiceprints.enrollmentHowItWorks3: Finch learns your voice pattern to label you in future transcripts.
voiceprints.enrollmentHowItWorks4: You review the recording before anything is saved.
voiceprints.enrollmentRecordHint: Read the passage below at a natural pace, then stop when you are done.
voiceprints.enrollmentSoundCheckHint: Speak at your normal volume. The waveform should move when your microphone is picking up sound.
voiceprints.enrollmentSoundCheckActive: Say a few words to confirm your microphone is working.
voiceprints.enrollmentReviewHint: Listen to your recording, then save the voiceprint or discard it.
voiceprints.enrollmentSpeakerNameHint: This name appears on transcripts when this voice is recognized.
voiceprints.enrollmentNameRequired: Add your name in About you above before recording your voiceprint.
voiceprints.enrollmentExampleEn: Finch uses this short recording to learn my voice. I speak clearly at a natural pace so future recordings can recognize me automatically.
voiceprints.enrollmentExampleZh: Finch 会用这段简短录音来学习我的声音。我以自然、清晰的语速朗读，以便今后的录音能够自动识别我。
voiceprints.enrollmentMinDuration: Record at least {{seconds}} seconds for a reliable voiceprint.
voiceprints.enrollmentSetAsYouDescription: Link this voiceprint to Settings → About you.
voiceprints.renameDescription: Update the display name shown on transcripts.
voiceprints.deleteDescription: This removes the voiceprint profile and all stored voiceprint samples. This cannot be undone.
voiceprints.consentBody1: Finch can store voiceprint samples on your machine to recognize speakers in future recordings. This data never leaves your computer.
voiceprints.consentBody2: You can delete individual voiceprint profiles or wipe all voiceprint data anytime from Settings.

settings.languageDescription: Interface language and preferred language for AI-generated notes.
settings.uiLanguageDescription: Language for menus, buttons, and other app text.
settings.contentLanguageDescription: Language used when generating meeting summaries and other AI notes.
settings.contentLanguageSetEn: AI note language set to English
settings.contentLanguageSetZh: AI note language set to 中文
settings.aiNotesDescription: How Finch generates meeting summaries and other AI notes.
settings.summaryStyleDescription: Applied when generating a meeting summary note.
settings.notesAutoSaveDescription: When enabled, note edits save automatically while you type.
settings.speakersDescription: Names linked to stored voiceprints, and automatic labeling on new recordings.
settings.autoLabelReadyDescription: Apply saved names from voiceprint profiles when transcribing new recordings.
settings.autoLabelNotReady: Enable voiceprint profiles in Settings → Transcription first.
settings.transcriptionDescriptionLoading: Configure speaker diarization and voiceprint profile storage.
settings.transcriptionDescription: Speaker diarization and voiceprint profile settings are saved locally in the Finch database, like LLM credentials.
settings.diarizationReadyDescription: Identify different speakers when transcribing audio.
settings.diarizationNotReady: Diarization is not ready. Set HF_TOKEN in backend .env and accept model terms.
settings.voiceprintProfilesFeatureReadyDescriptio: Save voiceprint samples from Settings or when labeling speakers on a recording.
settings.voiceprintProfilesFeatureNotReady: Enable diarization and set HF_TOKEN in backend .env first.
settings.youDescription: Your display name and voiceprint used to recognize you in recordings.
settings.yourNameDescription: How Finch refers to you in summaries and AI features.
settings.yourSpeakerDescriptionLinked: The voiceprint linked to you. Record a new sample to replace it.
settings.yourSpeakerDescriptionUnlinked: Record a short sample, then transcribe new recordings with auto-label enabled. Existing transcripts are not updated.
settings.yourSpeakerUnknownHint: Unknown Speaker means matching ran but confidence was too low. Re-record your voiceprint or assign a speaker on a turn.
settings.recordMyVoiceprintDescription: Record a short sample of your voice. Your name from About you is used for this profile.
settings.savedVoiceprintsDescription: Voiceprints for you and other speakers. Yours is managed in About you.
settings.llmDescriptionLoading: Configure the model provider used for AI actions.
settings.llmDescription: Configure the model provider used for AI notes. Only transcript text is sent—not audio. Credentials are stored locally in the Finch database and are never returned by the API.
settings.llmStatusNotReady: Add an API key and save to enable AI notes.
settings.llmApiKeySavedHint: A key is saved. Enter a new value to replace it.
settings.llmApiKeyOptionalLocal: Optional for local servers without authentication.
settings.llmBaseUrlCustom: OpenAI-compatible endpoint, e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama.
settings.llmBaseUrlOpenai: Optional. Override for Azure OpenAI, proxies, or other compatible endpoints.
settings.llmBaseUrlOpenrouter: Optional. Override the OpenRouter API base URL.
settings.llmBaseUrlAnthropic: Optional. Override the Anthropic API base URL.

toasts.speakerSettingsFailed: Failed to update voiceprint profile settings
toasts.generateNoteFailed: Failed to generate note. Try again.
